news.headline: Dollar General's Q4 revenue beats estimates at $10.304 billion, same-store sales rise 1.2%; stock jumps on report.
news.summary: Dollar General Corp (NYSE:DG) saw an uptick in premarket trading on Thursday following the release of their fourth-quarter FY24 earnings report. The company posted a 4.5% year-on-year sales growth, reaching $10.304 billion, surpassing the analyst consensus of $10.264 billion. Same-store sales rose by 1.2%, attributed to a 2.3% increase in average transaction amount, offset by a 1.1% decrease in customer traffic. The gross profit margin dipped by 8 basis points to 29.4%, while the operating margin shrank by 302 basis points to 2.86%. Operating income for the quarter fell by 49.2% to $294.2 million, with an earnings per share (EPS) of $0.87 missing the estimated $1.51. On the financial side, the company held $932.576 million in cash and equivalents.

news.headline: CanAsia Energy Corp reports 2024 results with $1.2M net income, $3.1M working capital. Shares outstanding 112.8M. Operations cash flow: $2.7M.
news.summary: CanAsia Energy Corp. reported their 2024 year-end and fourth quarter financial and operating results. The company had working capital of $3.1 million, no long-term debt, and shareholders' equity of $7.8 million by December 31, 2024. They had 112.8 million common shares outstanding. CanAsia's net income in 2024 was $1.2 million compared to a net loss of $3.2 million in 2023. Cash flow used in operations was $2.7 million in 2024, higher than the $2.0 million in 2023. The company also announced the acquisition of 25% working interest in heavy oil sands leases in Sawn Lake for approximately $1.3 million. CanAsia also granted options to purchase 8.3 million common shares in 2024. The full story is available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Nathan's Famous opens new franchise in Rock Hill, SC with full menu including hot dogs, burgers, and more.
news.summary: Nathan’s Famous, Inc., a long-standing American favorite with over a century of history, has revealed the launch of a new franchised restaurant in Rock Hill, South Carolina. The newly opened location showcases Nathan’s updated free-standing restaurant concept and offers a diverse menu. This includes the brand’s exclusive southern tempura batter and hand-dipped chicken dishes, as well as fresh Angus burgers, their renowned hot dogs, crispy fries, and indulgent deep-fried ripper dogs. This expansion continues to uphold Nathan’s legacy of providing beloved New York flavors to customers.

news.headline: Cintas named on Forbes' list of America's Best Large Employers for third year in a row due to positive feedback.
news.summary: Cintas, based in Cincinnati, has been recognized for the third year in a row for its exceptional performance based on feedback from employee-partners, consumers, and industry peers. The company continues to receive praise for its efforts.

news.headline: Cizzle Brands Corp. to announce FQ2 financial results for 2025 on March 17, webcast scheduled for March 27.
news.summary: Cizzle Brands Corporation, listed on Cboe Canada as CZZL, OTCQB as CZZLF, and on Frankfurt as 8YF, revealed intentions to disclose its financial performance for the second quarter of fiscal year 2025, ending on January 31, 2025, after the market closes on Monday, March 17, 2025. Interested parties can access these results on the company's SEDAR+ profile. Cizzle Brands will host a webcast to delve into these results on Thursday.

news.headline: YourChoice Therapeutics reveals hormone-free birth control pill for men in Nature publication.
news.summary: In San Francisco, a recent study has revealed the development of a hormone-free birth control pill designed for men. This innovative contraceptive method offers an alternative to traditional hormone-based options. The pill is set to provide men with a new birth control alternative, with the study findings heralding a breakthrough in reproductive health. This advancement marks a significant development in contraceptive research, potentially offering men a non-hormonal option for family planning.

news.headline: AEO Inc. (NYSE: AEO) declares $0.125 quarterly dividend per share, payable on April 25, 2025.
news.summary: American Eagle Outfitters, Inc. declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.125 per share on March 11, 2025. This dividend is set to be payable on April 25, 2025, to stockholders of record as of April 11, 2025. American Eagle Outfitters, Inc. (NYSE: AEO) is a prominent global specialty retailer known for its popular apparel brands such as American Eagle, Aerie, OFFL/NE by Aerie, and Todd Sn.

news.headline: Perfect Moment appoints Kristine Marvin as General Counsel, with 28+ years experience.
news.summary: In London, luxury skiwear brand Perfect Moment Ltd. (NYSE American: PMNT) has named Kristine Marvin as the new general counsel. With over 28 years of expertise in corporate and intellectual property law, compliance, and governance for both private and public firms, Marvin will oversee the enhancement of the legal framework for Perfect Moment. This appointment highlights the company’s focus on strengthening its legal operations under Marvin's leadership.

news.headline: Latest figures show slight decrease in jobless claims to 220K.
CyberArk reports rise in machine identity incidents, with 72% of orgs experiencing certificate-related outages in past year.
news.summary: In Newton, Massachusetts, and Petach Tikva, Israel, CyberArk (NASDAQ: CYBR) has announced the release of its 2025 State of Machine Identity Security Report. The report indicates a growing trend in machine identity-related security incidents, with a significant increase in incidents as the number and complexity of machine identities continue to grow. According to the report, 72% of organizations have encountered at least one certificate-related outage in the last year. This demonstrates a noteworthy rise in comparison to previous periods.

news.headline: Wall Street bull cuts S&P 500 targets due to Trump tariffs. Yardeni realizes President isn't bluffing.
news.summary: Renowned Wall Street optimist Ed Yardeni is reducing his S&P 500 goals due to concerns over Trump's tariffs. Yardeni acknowledges that President Trump's stance on tariffs is serious and not mere bluffing. This adjustment reflects a significant shift in Yardeni's outlook on the market.

news.headline: GeneDx will present research at 2025 ACMG Annual Meeting, with 3 platform and 2 poster presentations.
news.summary: In GAITHERSBURG, Maryland, GeneDx (Nasdaq: WGS), a prominent provider of genomic insights for enhanced health outcomes, revealed its involvement in the upcoming 2025 American College of Medical Genetics and Genomics (ACMG) Annual Clinical Genetics Meeting. The company will be demonstrating its role as a frontrunner in genomic research and advancement by presenting three platform presentations and two poster presentations at the event. GeneDx's impactful contributions earned it one of the few spots available for participation.

news.headline: Stock market rebounds as Dow Jones futures fall after Nasdaq rally; Tesla, Nvidia, Palantir dominate gains.
news.summary: On Wednesday, the stock market saw a recovery following the release of mild CPI inflation statistics. Notably, Tesla, Nvidia, and Palantir, which were strongly affected by recent fluctuations, led the market gains. Despite this positive trend, Dow Jones futures experienced a decline after the Nasdaq rally, with a significant focus on the performance of Tesla, Nvidia, and Palantir.

news.headline: Dow Jones futures fell due to Trump tariff threats; Adobe stock tumbled after earnings.
news.summary: On Thursday, Dow Jones futures experienced a decline in anticipation of forthcoming inflation figures and jobless claims. Adobe's stock plummeted following its earnings announcement in today's stock market trading. Additionally, there were discussions of new tariff threats from Trump. The Investor's Business Daily reported on the drop in Dow Jones futures and Adobe's performance post-earnings.

news.headline: Crown Bioscience names John Gu as CEO, transitioning from COO. JSR Life Sciences and Japan-based JSR Corporation.
news.summary: Crown Bioscience, a worldwide contract research organization under JSR Life Sciences and JSR Corporation, has announced John Gu as its new CEO. Formerly the COO and interim CEO, Gu brings extensive experience to the role, particularly in digital strategy, business transformation, and genomic data analysis. The appointment comes as part of the company's strategic development, positioning itself for growth in the competitive CRO market. Crown Bioscience is headquartered in the USA and plays a significant role globally.

news.headline: Nuvve forms subsidiary in New Mexico to support clean transportation and energy goals; recent contract awarded in the state.
news.summary: In San Diego, Nuvve Holding Corp. (Nasdaq: NVVE) revealed the establishment of Nuvve New Mexico LLC, a subsidiary aimed at backing the firm's State of New Mexico contract win. This new entity will act as a regional representative, aiding in the contract's efficient fulfillment and extending Nuvve's pioneering energy solutions in the state. Being awarded the contract marks a significant development for the company.

news.headline: Argan, Inc. (NYSE: AGX) to release Q4 & fiscal year-end 2025 results on March 27. Conference call at 5:00 p.m. ET.
news.summary: Argan, Inc. shared that they will disclose their financial results for the fourth quarter and fiscal year-end of 2025 on March 27, 2025, post-market close. A webcast along with a conference call will be conducted by management on the same day at 5:00 p.m. ET. Interested individuals can tune in to the live webcast through a specific link provided. Alternatively, participants can join the call via phone.

news.headline: US Commerce Secretary Lutnick: 2Q economic data will still show some of Biden policies.
US Commerce Secretary Lutnick interview ends
Vicarious Surgical appoints Sarah Romano as CFO, effective April 1, 2025. Leveraging her finance experience, she will lead the financial strategy of the company.
news.summary: Vicarious Surgical Inc., a leading robotics technology company focused on enhancing robotic surgery, has revealed the appointment of Sarah Romano as their new CFO, starting April 1, 2025. Operating under the ticker symbols NYSE: RBOT and RBOT WS, the company aims to revolutionize surgical procedures. Ms. Romano, equipped with extensive capital markets experience, will spearhead Vicarious Surgical’s financial strategies. This move signifies the company’s commitment to advancing its financial outlook under her seasoned guidance.

news.headline: Sigma launches Data Apps to unify business workflows on cloud platform, addressing SaaS overload issue. No-code tools for custom apps.
news.summary: In San Francisco, the issue of SaaS overload is causing problems for businesses by creating fragmented workflows, inefficiencies, and higher costs. To address this issue, Sigma, a top analytics platform known for its cloud data platform writeback capabilities, has introduced Data Apps. These innovative tools do not require coding and empower businesses to create and automate personalized, data-focused applications on their cloud data platforms. Sigma's launch of Data Apps expands its platform beyond traditional analytics capabilities.

news.headline: GeneDx introduces Multiscore, AI-powered Gene Ranker tool to enhance genetic analysis, improve efficiency, & clinical insights. #AI #Genomics.
news.summary: GeneDx, based in Gaithersburg, Maryland, has introduced Multiscore, an innovative AI-driven decision support tool integrated into their interpretation platform. This tool, aimed at transforming genetic analysis, enhances diagnostic efficiency, streamlines workflows, and improves clinical insights. Multiscore revolutionizes the process by assisting clinical geneticists in identifying the most pertinent genes during the analysis. GeneDx, listed as WGS on Nasdaq, is known for providing genomic insights to enhance health outcomes.

news.headline: Stock market volatility persists due to Trump's tariffs and budget cuts, impacting investors and economy.
news.summary: The fluctuating decisions of the administration are causing confusion among investors, leading to uncertainty that could harm the economy.

news.headline: Comcast's Q1 2025 earnings call on April 24, 2025 at 8:30 am ET will be live on their website www.cmcsa.com.
news.summary: Philadelphia-based Comcast Corporation is set to hold a conference call with the financial community to review its first-quarter financial results on Thursday, April 24, 2025, at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time. The company will release a press statement earlier that day detailing its performance. Investors can tune into the live broadcast of the conference call on Comcast’s Investor Relations website at www.cmcsa.com. A playback of the call will also be accessible as of 11:30 a.m. ET on the same day.

news.headline: Archer Aviation and Palantir to collaborate on AI for aviation tech, aiming to revolutionize industry. $ACHR, $PLTR involved.
news.summary: In Santa Clara, California, Archer Aviation Inc. (NYSE: ACHR) and Palantir Technologies Inc. (Nasdaq: PLTR) have revealed a new collaboration to establish the AI groundwork for the advancement of next-generation aviation technologies. The aviation sector has long faced challenges in progressing due to outdated technology and the dominance of a duopoly in commercial aviation. However, with the recent advancements in AI and distributed electric propulsion, the industry is on the cusp of significant change. This partnership aims to revolutionize the sector and create innovative solutions.

news.headline: VeChain introduces Galactica phase for VeChainThor, with VIP upgrades for improved tokenomics and blockchain interoperability. Stakeholders vote on changes beginning Feb 24.
news.summary: VeChain has unveiled the Galactica phase, which includes significant VIP enhancements to VeChainThor, with the goal of improving tokenomics and blockchain interoperability. Stakeholders will have the opportunity to vote on these updates beginning on February 24th.

news.headline: New Menifee, CA location by Yoshiharu to open March 12.
news.summary: In the latest report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has risen to 7.8%, marking an increase of 1.2% compared to the previous quarter. This means that there are now approximately 2.3 million people without jobs. Additionally, it was noted that the inflation rate has also gone up, reaching 4.5% in the same period. This surge in inflation is mainly attributed to the recent increase in the prices of essential goods such as food and fuel. Experts are expressing concerns about the impact these economic changes will have on the overall stability of the nation's economy. The government has vowed to take necessary measures to address these issues and work towards creating more job opportunities for the citizens.

news.headline: Raj Melkote named 374Water's new Chief Technology Officer.

Telegram's Wallet to add 50 tokens, launch yield program. Custodial services with new features, incl. Ether, XRP, Dogecoin. Initial rollout in-app only for non-TON tokens. Earn feature coming with 0.1 TON min deposit. Further altcoins and stablecoins to follow.
news.summary: Wallet in Telegram, a third-party cryptocurrency wallet, is expanding its custodial services by adding at least 50 new cryptocurrencies and introducing an "Earn" feature for users. The largest venture builder in The Open Network ecosystem announced the rollout of the new generation on March 13, which will include major cryptocurrencies like Ether and XRP, as well as memecoins like Dogecoin and Pepe. The new features will be introduced within the next two months, with the initial rollout limited to in-app transactions for non-TON tokens. The Earn feature will allow users to gain yields on assets like Tether's USDt, with a minimum deposit of 0.1 TON. The spokesperson mentioned that the list of tokens is not final yet and will be gradually rolled out. Wallet plans to expand the Earn section to more altcoins and stablecoins in the future.

news.headline: Emergent BioSolutions supports new opioid overdose preparedness programs, expanding NARCAN Nasal Spray access. Opioid deaths decline nationwide after five years.
news.summary: In Gaithersburg, Maryland, on March 13, 2025, Emergent BioSolutions Inc. announced its initiative to enhance collaborations with various sectors and uphold its dedication to promoting opioid emergency preparedness. This comes as a positive development, with national opioid overdose death rates decreasing for the first time in five years. The company, listed on the NYSE as EBS, is actively partnering with organizations to broaden the availability of NARCAN® Nasal Spray and raise awareness among the public on managing opioid overdose emergencies.

news.headline: BlackSky provides AI analytics using high-res Gen-3 imagery within three weeks of launch in Virginia.
news.summary: In Herndon, Virginia, BlackSky has announced the successful delivery of advanced AI-enabled detection and identification analytics on recently launched Gen-3 imagery. This achievement occurred a mere three weeks post-launch. The new imagery boasts significantly enhanced resolution, marking a notable advancement in imaging technology.

news.headline: Rocky Mountain Chocolate Factory appoints Brian Quinn to Board of Directors in Durango, Colo on March 13, 2025. $RMCF (Nasdaq).
news.summary: In Durango, Colorado, on March 13, 2025, Rocky Mountain Chocolate Factory Inc. (Nasdaq: RMCF) disclosed the appointment of Brian Quinn to its Board of Directors. Quinn will join the Nominating and Corporate Governance, Audit, and Compensation Committees. Rocky Mountain Chocolate Factory Inc. is known as America’s Chocolatier™ and is a top franchiser of a high-quality chocolate and confectionary retail store concept.

news.headline: Navitas introduces Single-Stage Bi-Directional Switch Converters for improved efficiency and performance in power conversion.
news.summary: Cutting-edge Bi-Directional GaNFast™ technology, along with the latest IsoFast™ drivers, are facilitating the development of innovative 'single-stage' configurations, bolstering efficiency, power density, and overall performance in both AC-DC and AC-AC conversion processes. These advancements are poised to significantly enhance the way power is utilized, with the potential to increase efficiency levels by a notable percentage while simultaneously optimizing power density and performance metrics in various conversion applications.

news.headline: Allarity Therapeutics reaches settlement with SEC, ending investigation.
iPower's SuperSuite supply chain business drives record revenue, contributing 20% to total revenue.
news.summary: A significant portion of iPower's revenue, around 20%, is now attributed to the SuperSuite product.

news.headline: Cerence AI launches Cerence xUI™, a hybrid, LLM-based platform for in-car AI experience.
news.summary: Today, Cerence AI launched Cerence xUI™, a platform for intelligent AI assistants that operates on both the edge and the cloud.

news.headline: DBK signals auto industry loans as increasing risk.
Femasys obtains Europe approval for FemBloc, the first non-surgical permanent birth control for women worldwide.
news.summary: The FemBloc delivery system has been approved as the first of its kind in the world for women looking for permanent birth control. This groundbreaking approval opens up new possibilities for women seeking a long-term contraceptive solution. The FemBloc delivery system offers a safe and effective way for women to achieve permanent birth control. This advancement in the field of women's health is a significant milestone and is expected to benefit a large number of women globally.

news.headline: Private U.S. space company acquires NASA-certified M35A battery cells from KULR Technology Group.
news.summary: KULR Technology Group, Inc. is excited to share that a leading private U.S. space company has purchased their NASA-certified M35A battery cells.

news.headline: NETSOL introduces Transcend AI Labs for AI solutions in asset retail and finance targeting automakers, financiers.
news.summary: NETSOL Technologies, Inc. recently introduced Transcend AI Labs, a new innovation hub aimed at supporting automotive and equipment OEMs as well as financiers. This initiative from NETSOL Technologies, Inc. is designed to assist these stakeholders in leveraging advanced technologies to enhance their operations and services.

news.headline: Kane Biotech gets IRB approval for DispersinB® Acne trial with University of Miami for mild to moderate Acne Vulgaris.
news.summary: Kane has collaborated with the University of Miami to conduct a study on the effectiveness of DispersinB® Acne Cleanser in treating mild to moderate cases of Acne Vulgaris. This research project will involve examining the impact of the cleanser on a substantial number of individuals suffering from this common skin condition.

news.headline: FitLife Brands to attend 37th Annual Roth Conference on March 17-18, 2025. Contact Roth rep for investor meetings.
news.summary: Omaha, Nebraska - FitLife Brands, Inc., a leading provider of unique nutritional supplements and wellness products, revealed its participation in the 37th Annual Roth Conference happening on March 17-18, 2025. Interested investors looking to engage with FitLife management during the event are advised to send their meeting requests through their designated Roth representative. FitLife, listed as FTLF on the Nasdaq exchange, continues to make strides in the health and wellness industry, continuously introducing innovative products to the market.

news.headline: GEN Restaurant Group, Inc. launches $5 million stock repurchase program for Common Stock (Globe Newswire).
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, GEN Restaurant Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: GENK), the company behind GEN Korean BBQ, a popular casual dining brand known for its interactive "grill at your table" experience, shared plans for a stock repurchase initiative. The board of directors approved a program enabling the repurchase of up to $5.0 million worth of shares of the company’s Class A common stock, each valued at $0.001. This move provides flexibility as the stock repurchase program can be halted or terminated at any point, without a set obligation to acquire a specific number of shares.

news.headline: Urgent.ly Inc. to perform a 1-for-12 reverse stock split to meet Nasdaq compliance by raising bid price per share to $1.00.
news.summary: Vienna, Virginia, March 13, 2025 - Urgent.ly Inc. (Nasdaq: ULY) announced a reverse stock split of its common stock at a ratio of 1-for-12, effective at the close of trading on March 17, 2025. This decision was made to meet Nasdaq’s Marketplace Rule 5550(a)(2) requirement of a minimum $1.00 bid price per share. Following this, Urgent.ly's common stock is set to begin trading on a reverse-split-adjusted basis on Nasdaq from March 18, 2025, retaining the ticker symbol "ULY."

news.headline: OCP will release Q4 and full year 2024 results on March 20, 2025, available on OCP Intralinks portal at 9:00 a.m. EST.
news.summary: OCP S.A., a leading company in the fertilizer industry, will announce its Q4 and full-year 2024 results on March 20, 2025. The information will be accessible to the Company's bondholders, qualified institutional buyers, analysts, and market makers via the OCP Intralinks portal at 9:00 a.m. EST, 1:00 p.m. in Morocco and London (GMT). Senior management from OCP will conduct a conference call to review the fourth-quarter performance.

news.headline: IperionX releases interim financial report for six months ending Dec 31, 2024 in Charlotte, NC. #IPX
news.summary: In Charlotte, North Carolina, IperionX has released its Interim Financial Report covering the period of six months ending on December 31, 2024. This report provides a snapshot of the company's financial performance during this timeframe. Key financial figures and data are included in this report to offer stakeholders insight into the company's financial health and trajectory. The report covers important metrics such as revenue, expenses, profits, and other financial indicators for the specified period. It serves as a crucial tool for investors, analysts, and others interested in tracking IperionX's financial status and performance.

Canadian Building Permits MoM Actual -3.2% (Forecast -5%, Previous 11.0%)
